references.text: Green, PS. 1991. The Indo-Pacific strand Scaevola (Goodeniaceae) - yet again! Taxon 40: 118-122.
Huang, T-C. 1996. Notes on the flora of Taiwan (25) The genus Scaevola L. (Goodeniaceae). Taiwania 41: 252-258
Leenhouts, PW. 1957. Goodeniaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 5: 335-344
Malabrigo, PL. 2020. Scaevola subalpina (Goodeniaceae), a new species from Mount Mantalingahan Protected Landscape, Palawan, Philippines. Brittonia 72: 406-409

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 25 July 2025

species.citation: (R.Br.) Carolin , Telopea 3 (1990) 565; ≡ Calogyne pilosa R.Br. , Prodr. Fl. Nov. Holland. (1810) 579 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 589; Leenh., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 5 (1957) 337. = Balingayum decumbens Blanco , Fl. Filip., 1st Ed. (1837) 187.
species.distribution: Australia, China, Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines. CULION, LUZON: Bulacan, NCR, Rizal, Zambales.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 5 October 2025

species.citation: C.Presl , Reliq. Haenk. 2 (1835) 58 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 590; Leenh., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 5 (1957) 342; Fernando et al., Forest Flora of Dinagat (2017) 93; Romeroso et al., J. Asia-Pacific biodiv. 17 (2024) 11. = Scaevola pedunculata Merr. , PJS 5c (1910) 251 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 591. = Scaevola pedunculata var. mollis Merr. , PJS 5c (1910) 251.
species.distribution: Borneo, Philippines, Taiwan. DINAGAT, HOMONHON, LUZON: Aurora, Camarines Norte, Ilocos Norte, Isabela (photos), Zambales, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Davao Oriental, Surigao, Surigao del Norte, PALAWAN, SIBUYAN.

species.citation: Roxb. , Fl. Ind. (Carey & Wallich) 2 (1824) 148 ; Leenh., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 5 (1957) 342. = Scaevola acuminatissima Merr. , PJS 5c (1910) 249 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 590. = Scaevola minahassae Koord. , Meded. Lands Plantentuin 19 (1898) 513 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 591. = Scaevola dajoensis Merr. , PJS 2c (1907) 427 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 590. = Scaevola mindorensis Merr. , PJS 5c (1910) 250 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 591.
species.distribution: Australia, Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi. JOLO, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao Oriental (photos), Davao de Oro (photos), Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS.
species.notes: Mostly in rather open sites such as along forest edges, road and river sides, in shrubberies and secondary vegetation, rarely in forest. Fl. & fr. Jan-Dec. 0-2700m.

species.citation: Malabrigo & Ondoy , Brittonia 72 (2020) 406; Type: Malabrigo 589 (LBC, holo; CAHUP, EBL, PNH, iso), Palawan: Rizal, Mt Mantalingahan Protected Landscape, 2067m, 26-Jul-2019.

(Gaertn.) Roxb. , Hort. Bengal. (1814) 15 ; Huang, Taiwania 41 (1996) 255; Romeroso et al., Asian J. Biol. Life Sc. 10 (2021) 438; Cortez et al., Check List 19 (2023) 988; Cañeda et al., Davao Research J. 16 (2025) 91; ≡ Lobelia taccada Gaertn. , Fruct. Sem. Pl. 1 (1788) 119. = Scaevola merrillii Elmer , LPB 4 (1912) 1492. = Scaevola sericea Vahl , Symb. Bot. (Vahl) 2 (1791) 37 ; Leenh., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 5 (1957) 339. = Scaevola frutescens (Mill.) Krause , Pflanzenr. (Engler) IV (277) (1912) 125 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 590; ≡ Lobelia frutescens Mill. , Gard. Dict., 8th Ed. (1768) n.1.
species.distribution: Africa, Australia, Madagascar, Pacific Ocean, Philippines. ALIGUAY, APO, BORACAY (photos), BUSUANGA, DANJUGAN (photos), HOMONHON, HUNDRED ISLS (photos), KINAPUSAN, LANGAAN, LUZON: Aurora, Camarines Norte, Camarines Sur, Ilocos Sur, Pangasinan (photos), Quezon, Zambales, MANTIGUE, MASBATE, MINDANAO: Davao, Davao Occidental, Davao Oriental, Misamis Oriental (photos), MINDORO, PALAWAN, PANAY (photos), POLILLO, PONEAS, SIARGAO, SIBUTU, SIBUYAN.
species.notes: Throughout Malesia; restricted to the seashore, usually on the open sandy beach or on coastal cliffs of rocky coasts. Fl. & fr. Jan-Dec. 0m.
